text: سَمِعْتُ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) لَعَنَ اللَّهُ مَنْ قَتَلَ غَيْرَ قَاتِلِهِ أَوْ ضَرَبَ غَيْرَ ضَارِبِهِ وَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) لَعَنَ اللَّهُ مَنْ أَحْدَثَ حَدَثاً أَوْ آوَى مُحْدِثاً قُلْتُ وَ مَا الْمُحْدِثُ قَالَ مَنْ قَتَلَ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moala Bin Muhammad and a number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, altogether from Al Washa who said,

‘I heard Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘May Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Curse the one who killed someone other than his (attempted) killer, or struck someone other than the one who struck him’. And Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘May Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Curse the one who initiates an event (killing), or shelters an initiator (of a killing)’. I said, ‘And what is the initiator?’ He<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘The one who kills’.
